articles.title: Fubo Reports Subscriber Loss
articles.summary: FuboTV announced its first-quarter results, reporting a global streaming business that exceeded subscriber guidance and improved profitability metrics despite a loss of subscribers. North American paid subscribers were down 2.7% year-over-year, while Rest of World subscribers saw a 10.9% decrease. The company also highlighted its agreement with Disney to combine Fubo with Hulu + Live TV, a deal that included a $220 million payment to end antitrust litigation and a commitment for a $145 million term loan from Disney in 2026.

articles.title: Brand Creates Exclusive Collectible Cans in celebration of Disney’s “Lilo & Stitch” Live-Action Movie
articles.summary: The SPAM® brand has announced a collaboration with Disney's upcoming live-action "Lilo & Stitch" movie, releasing exclusive Hawaiian-inspired limited-edition collectible cans featuring artwork from the film. This partnership also includes a new TV commercial campaign starting May 5, celebrating the cultural connection both the SPAM® brand and Stitch share with Hawaiian traditions and family. The collectible cans are available nationwide, with the movie set to premiere in theaters on May 23, 2025.

articles.title: The Walt Disney Company To Participate In The Moffettnathanson Media, Internet & Communications Conference
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company announced that Josh D’Amaro, Chairman, Disney Experiences, will participate in a question-and-answer session at the MoffettNathanson Media, Internet & Communications Conference. The session is scheduled for Wednesday, May 14, 2025, at approximately 9:40 a.m. ET/ 6:40 a.m. PT. A live stream will be available on the company's investor relations website, where an archived recording will also be accessible.
